metadata.task_title: Add a song to a playlist
metadata.instruction: Create the playlist "Fun with Kids" on Media Player and add Task ID 76.mp3 in Documents > Task 76 folder to the playlist.
metadata.context: I want to make a new playlist to organize my music better. I want to add "Baby Shark" video in my playlist.

l3.rationale: Moved the cursor to the Search button in Explorer.

l4.rationale: The user is moving around Media Player, opening the Music library/settings area and then heading toward Playlists to set up the playlist workflow.

l5.rationale: Opens the playlist creation flow and enters the new playlist name "Fun with Kids".
